title: Portfolio Website
description: This site — a single-page portfolio built with Next.js 16, Tailwind CSS v4, and Framer Motion. Features scroll-triggered animations, a custom cursor effect, and data-driven content loaded from JSON.

title: Sound sniff
description: SoundSniff Music Explorer is a modern music exploration web app built with React, Redux, and Vite. It provides an interface to explore music data with features such as multi-language support, API calls, and testing setups.

title: Resume Builder
description: A responsive resume builder web app built with React and TypeScript. Features a clean UI, drag-and-drop functionality, and export options for PDF and DOCX formats.
